text: Vision-{{c1::language models}} align image and text representations so the system can reason over both modalities.
explanation: These systems are central to image understanding, visual QA, and document intelligence.
usage: Used in OCR, accessibility, retail, and medical imaging products.
spanish: Los modelos de visión y lenguaje alinean representaciones de imagen y texto para que el sistema pueda razonar sobre ambas modalidades.

scenario: Multimodal AI: CLIP and Contrastive Learning 🧲
text: Contrastive learning trains {{c1::embeddings}} so related image-text pairs are close together in representation space.
explanation: This is the foundation of many zero-shot retrieval and classification systems.
usage: Useful in search, recommendation, and interactive multimodal applications.
spanish: El aprendizaje contrastivo entrena embeddings para que pares imagen-texto relacionados estén cerca en el espacio de representación.

scenario: Multimodal AI: OCR and Document Understanding 📄
text: OCR {{c1::pipelines}} convert scanned documents into text, while document AI extracts structure and meaning from layouts.
explanation: This is crucial for invoices, contracts, manuals, and knowledge ingestion.
usage: Widely used in enterprise automation and compliance workflows.
spanish: Las pipelines OCR convierten documentos escaneados en texto, mientras que la IA de documentos extrae estructura y significado de diseños.

text: Speech-to-text and text-to-speech systems convert between {{c1::audio}} and language for conversational experiences.
explanation: Audio AI is essential for voice assistants, transcription, and accessibility tools.
usage: Used in call centers, dictation tools, and assistive technologies.
spanish: Los sistemas de voz a texto y texto a voz convierten entre audio y lenguaje para experiencias conversacionales.

text: Dense {{c1::embeddings}} capture semantic similarity, while sparse embeddings rely on explicit token overlap.
explanation: Each representation is useful in different retrieval and ranking settings.
usage: Common in search, similarity matching, and recommendation systems.
spanish: Los embeddings densos capturan similitud semántica, mientras que los dispersos dependen de solapamiento explícito de tokens.

text: Vector databases index high-dimensional {{c1::embeddings}} to support fast nearest-neighbor search.
explanation: They are the backbone of retrieval systems that need to scale over many documents.
usage: Critical in RAG, recommender systems, and semantic search.
spanish: Las bases de datos vectoriales indexan embeddings de alta dimensión para soportar búsqueda rápida de vecinos más cercanos.

text: {{c1::Semantic similarity}} measures how closely two pieces of content mean the same thing, not just how similar their words are.
explanation: It is a core idea in retrieval, clustering, and recommendations.
usage: Used in search ranking, deduplication, and content organization.
spanish: La similitud semántica mide qué tan cerca significan dos piezas de contenido, no solo qué tan similares son sus palabras.

text: Embedding {{c1::drift}} happens when the meaning captured by the vector space changes over time or across domains.
explanation: This can degrade retrieval quality if the index is not refreshed or re-evaluated.
usage: Important for search systems, recommender systems, and long-lived knowledge bases.
spanish: El drift de embeddings ocurre cuando el significado capturado por el espacio vectorial cambia con el tiempo o entre dominios.
